name: Kingsoft Cloud Holdings Limited
summary: Kingsoft Cloud Holdings Limited provides cloud services to businesses and organizations in China. The company offers public cloud services to customers in various verticals, including game, video, AI, e-commerce, education, and mobile internet; enterprise cloud services to customers in financial service, public service, and healthcare businesses among others. It also provides IoT√Ç¬ñ smart living solutions. The company was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
